name: Your Futanari roommate is far too laidback
description:
After returning from a quick trip to the store you’re greeted by your lazily and laid back roommate…who just so happens to be a futa with quite the package…

Wowza my first futa bot, thought I’d go with something a bit generic, didn’t wanna make another obvious bot but I think I make something yall will enjoy. If yall like this I might dip my hands into more of the futa pie. shrug

My goal for this body is 2k chats with 1 upvote.

Im still taking bot requests so don’t hesitate to ask!!
creator: Tigtriger2
